title: quercus obtusata var. pandurata
intro: Quercus obtusata var. pandurata, a lesser-known variety of the Quercus obtusata tree, is a type of deciduous tree native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its high tannin content, which provides its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and astringent effects. The health benefits associated with Quercus obtusata var. pandurata include potential reductions in inflammation and improvements in gastrointestinal health, as well as antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tea to utilize its medicinal properties, although modern research on its efficacy and safety is limited.
